aesthetic_rules.shadows: None. Rely on pure flat contrasts and 1px borders.
aesthetic_rules.spacing: Generous negative space. Use p-12 to p-24 for section paddings.
aesthetic_rules.accents: Thin 1px lines in gold (#BFA06A) or border (#CEC5B2) for structural elegance.

logo_treatment_strategy.problem: WDBTA and ISST logos are colorful and clash with the strict Navy/Gold palette.
logo_treatment_strategy.solution: The 'Passepartout' Museum Framing technique. Never place the raw logos directly on colored backgrounds. Wrap them in spacious white blocks with a delicate 1px border. Apply a partial desaturation filter that transitions to full color upon hover, treating them as interactive high-end artifacts.

Credentials_jsx.purpose: A hero-grade, standalone editorial moment anchoring the clinic's global credibility.

layout_blueprint.wrapper: bg-[#0E2333] text-[#F5F1EA] py-24 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24
layout_blueprint.grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center max-w-[1400px] mx-auto

components:
Micro-label: `
Acreditaciones Globales
`

Heading: `

La máxima distinción clínica en Chile.

`

Body: `

Somos la única institución en el país acreditada como miembro institucional de la WDBTA y certificada por la ISST.

`

right_column.composition: Asymmetrical staggered layout. Two framed plaques.

plaque_wdbta.wrapper: bg-white p-10 lg:p-12 border border-[#BFA06A] w-full max-w-sm ml-auto relative z-10
plaque_wdbta.image: src='/logos/wdbta.png' className='w-full h-auto max-w-[160px] mx-auto filter saturate-[0.2] hover:saturate-100 transition-all duration-700 ease-out mix-blend-multiply'
plaque_wdbta.caption: text-center mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-[#CEC5B2]/40 font-serif text-[#0E2333] text-lg
plaque_wdbta.sub_caption: uppercase tracking-widest text-[9px] font-sans text-[#6B6B6B] mt-2 block

plaque_isst.wrapper: bg-white p-10 lg:p-12 border border-[#BFA06A] w-full max-w-sm mr-auto -mt-12 lg:-mt-24 lg:-ml-12 relative z-20
plaque_isst.image: src='/logos/isst.jpg' className='w-full h-auto max-w-[160px] mx-auto filter saturate-[0.2] hover:saturate-100 transition-all duration-700 ease-out mix-blend-multiply'
plaque_isst.caption: text-center mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-[#CEC5B2]/40 font-serif text-[#0E2333] text-lg
plaque_isst.sub_caption: uppercase tracking-widest text-[9px] font-sans text-[#6B6B6B] mt-2 block

Sections_jsx_Schema.purpose: Refine the small accreditation chips to feel like premium editorial seals next to the content.

layout_blueprint.wrapper_replacement: Remove `.cert-chip` SaaS styling. Use a vertical 'Editorial Seal' stack.
layout_blueprint.container: flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-8 mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-[#CEC5B2]

seal_item.image_wrapper: w-16 h-16 shrink-0 border border-[#BFA06A] bg-white p-3 flex items-center justify-center
seal_item.image: w-full h-full object-contain filter grayscale contrast-125 opacity-70 group-hover:grayscale-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-700
seal_item.title: font-serif text-[#0E2333] text-xl
seal_item.subtitle: font-sans uppercase text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] text-[#BFA06A] mt-1

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Completely rewrite the Credentials.jsx component using the blueprint above. Abandon the simple 2-col grid. Use the asymmetrical split layout with a navy background and gold borders.
2. In Sections.jsx (SchemaSection), locate the '.cert-row' and '.cert-chip' elements and replace them with the 'Editorial Seal' blueprint defined here.
3. Do not add border-radius to anything.

4. Use CSS filters as defined (`saturate-[0.2]` or `grayscale`) to mute the logos initially, allowing them to bloom into full color on hover. This resolves the color clash while retaining brand recognition.
5. Ensure strict adherence to the existing typographic classes (DM Serif Display for serif, DM Sans for sans).
